name: fullstack-kanban-task-manager
description: Full-stack Kanban task manager with React, Express, and CI/CD workflows using GitHub Actions.

scripts.lint:server: node --check server/src/server.js && node --check server/src/app.js && node --check server/src/controllers/taskController.js && node --check server/src/models/taskModel.js && node --check server/src/routes/taskRoutes.js
scripts.lint: npm run lint:client && npm run lint:server

author: Vidit Pawar
